air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Emits `!air.kernel` metadata node and sets calling convention `fastcc` / `air_kernel`
cleanroom_notes: Entry stage marker for compute kernels

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Emits `!air.vertex` metadata node and sets vertex shader calling convention
cleanroom_notes: Entry stage marker for vertex shaders

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Emits `!air.fragment` metadata node and sets fragment shader calling convention
cleanroom_notes: Entry stage marker for fragment shaders

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Maps parameter/field to argument buffer slot `#N` inside `!air.kernel` parameter descriptor (`!"buffer", i32 N`)
cleanroom_notes: Drives resource slot binding and `!air.buffer_size` metadata

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Maps to texture binding slot `#N` inside argument metadata (`!"texture", i32 N`)
cleanroom_notes: Validates texture type (`texture2d` etc.) and index bounds

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Maps to sampler binding slot `#N` inside argument metadata (`!"sampler", i32 N`)
cleanroom_notes: Validates sampler handle type and limits

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Maps to shared memory (`LDS`) allocation slot `#N` in `!air.kernel` argument descriptor (`!"threadgroup_buffer", i32 N`)
cleanroom_notes: Uses `MetalBufferIndexAttr` internally with address space `as3` verification

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Unpacks struct fields into vertex input layout or fragment interpolant registers during CodeGen
cleanroom_notes: Validates struct field interface matching across pipeline stages

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects system register read `air.get_global_id` (`s0..s2`) directly into kernel prologue
cleanroom_notes: Builtin compute grid coordinate inquiry

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_local_id` system register read (`v0..v2` local coordinates)
cleanroom_notes: Builtin thread position inside SIMD group / threadgroup

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_local_linear_id` (`tid.x + tid.y*dim.x + ...`) scalar calculation
cleanroom_notes: 1D flattened local thread index

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_global_size` system register read (total compute grid dimensions)
cleanroom_notes: Inquires total dispatched grid threads

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_local_size` system register read (threadgroup block dimensions)
cleanroom_notes: Inquires local block dimensions (`blockDim`)

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_num_groups` system register read (number of threadgroups in grid)
cleanroom_notes: Inquires `gridDim`

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `__lowering_get_dispatch_threads` hook reading hidden dispatch metadata slot
cleanroom_notes: Used when non-uniform threadgroup sizes are dispatched

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_grid_origin` reading base coordinate offset of dispatch grid
cleanroom_notes: Multi-GPU or tiled dispatch base coordinates

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_simdgroup_index` (wavefront index inside threadgroup `tid / 32`)
cleanroom_notes: Cooperative SIMD group identification

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_simd_lane_id` (`laneid` / `tid % 32` / `sreg`)
cleanroom_notes: SIMD lane coordinate (`0..31` / `0..63`)

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_vertex_id` system input register read (`gl_VertexID`)
cleanroom_notes: Vertex shader invocation identifier

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects `air.get_instance_id` system input register read (`gl_InstanceID`)
cleanroom_notes: Instanced draw call invocation identifier

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Marks vertex position output or fragment pixel coordinate input (`gl_Position` / `gl_FragCoord`)
cleanroom_notes: Drives hardware rasterizer viewport transform and interpolation

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Maps struct field to framebuffer render target color attachment `#N` (`gl_FragColor[N]`)
cleanroom_notes: Validates return type against pixel format map (`PIXEL_FORMAT_MAP.md`)

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Marks point sprite point size output parameter (`gl_PointSize`)
cleanroom_notes: Drives point sprite expansion in rasterizer

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Marks user clip plane distance output (`gl_ClipDistance`)
cleanroom_notes: Hardware clipping test evaluation

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Marks layered rendering slice destination index (`gl_Layer` / RT array slice)
cleanroom_notes: Selects texture array slice in geometry/vertex stage

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Marks multi-viewport selection index (`gl_ViewportIndex`)
cleanroom_notes: Selects active viewport in hardware clipping stage

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects sub-triangle barycentric coordinates `(u,v,w)` inside fragment shader (`gl_BaryCoord`)
cleanroom_notes: Used for custom pull-model interpolation or wireframe rendering

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects triangle winding orientation boolean `is_front_facing` (`gl_FrontFacing`)
cleanroom_notes: Determines front vs back face hit

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects MSAA subpixel sample invocation ID (`gl_SampleID`)
cleanroom_notes: Per-sample fragment shading evaluation

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Injects / outputs MSAA coverage bitmask (`gl_SampleMask` / `gl_SampleMaskIn`)
cleanroom_notes: Drives multi-sample alpha coverage modification

air_metadata_or_codegen_effect: Assigns explicit user-defined varying location `#N` between vertex and fragment stages
cleanroom_notes: Guarantees link-time register matching between stages across distinct compilation units
